title: Advanced Idioms & Fixed Expressions
topics: formal idioms · business idioms · debate expressions · literary idioms
description: Pokročilé idiomy a ustálené výrazy na úrovni C1.

vocabulary.en: take the bull by the horns

examples.en: New evidence cast doubt on the official version of events.
examples.cz: Nové důkazy zpochybnily oficiální verzi událostí.

examples.en: She's at a crossroads in her career.
examples.cz: Je na životní křižovatce ve své kariéře.

examples.en: Stop beating around the bush — just tell me what happened.
examples.cz: Přestaň chodit kolem horké kaše — jen mi řekni, co se stalo.

examples.en: If you keep missing deadlines, you'll be on thin ice.
examples.cz: Pokud budeš stále přetahovat termíny, budeš na tenkém ledě.

examples.en: The company went from strength to strength after the merger.
examples.cz: Firma po fúzi nabírala na síle.

quiz.sentence: Stop ___ around the bush and say what you mean.
She ___ the jackpot with that investment.
The new study ___ doubt on previous findings.
He always ___ the buck — never takes responsibility.
It's time to take the ___ by the horns.

tasks: 1. Use 8 idioms from this lesson in sentences about your work or life
2. Write a short speech using at least 5 idioms naturally (not forced)
3. Find 3 of these idioms used in English newspapers this week
